title: juncago palustris
intro: Juncago palustris, also known as Marsh Juncaginum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Juncago palustris include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Juncago palustris include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
